_doc: NWS NEXRAD reflectivity color ramp (Z, dBZ). Each entry maps a dBZ value to a hex color. Phase A ships the file as a substrate placeholder; the consuming chart (radar-mosaic) lands in Phase B and reads the ramp via libs/wx-charts/src/raster/palettes.ts.
_source: NWS NIDS Level III base reflectivity (N0R) standard ramp, 16 levels, 5 dBZ steps
